content:
🌟 iothackbot | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Comprehensive security testing and vulnerability assessment of Internet of Things (IoT) devices and embedded systems.
✨ Key Features: • Network Discovery & Reconnaissance (wsdiscovery, iotnet, netflows, nmap) • Device-Specific Testing (onvifscan) • Firmware & File Analysis (chipsec, ffind) • Android Analysis (apktool, jadx) • Hardware & Console Access (picocom, telnetshell)
📖 Summary: IoTHackBot is an open-source toolkit for IoT security testing, offering a suite of command-line tools and AI-assisted Claude Code skills for discovering vulnerabilities in devices, firmware, and applications. It facilitates network reconnaissance, device-specific testing, firmware analysis, and Android app examination.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
